parameters.text:
={{
$json.run_mode === 'help'
  ? 'Report commands:\n\n/report — full report\n/health — health check only\n/speed — speed check only\n/help — command list'
  : $json.run_mode === 'full'
    ? ($json.is_manual ? '⏳ Started full report: health check + speed check.' : '⏳ Started scheduled report: health check + speed check.')
    : $json.run_mode === 'health'
      ? '⏳ Started site health check.'
      : $json.run_mode === 'speed'
        ? '⏳ Started speed check.'
        : 'Command not recognized.'
}}
